curation_notes: Pre-assigned as buffer-overflow from CWE-119, but the advisory title explicitly states 'Integer overflow in ImagingResampleHorizontal' and the patch adds integer overflow checks on multiplication operations (xsize * kmax, xsize * kmax * sizeof(float), xsize * 2 * sizeof(int)) before malloc calls. The root cause is integer overflow in size calculations leading to undersized allocations — reclassified to integer-overflow. Location derived from advisory description naming the function and confirmed by single-file patch diff. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern.
